proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup, T1: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) } = preserves_add[T0, T1](x0) }[Complex, Real](complex_re_fn)
